summarizerModel.title: Summarizer Model
summarizerModel.description: Model for generating session titles, summaries, and context compression. Defaults to default model.

contextWindow.title: Context Window
contextWindow.description: Maximum tokens for context window. If unset, derived from model defaults.

defaultLimits.title: Default Runtime Limits
defaultLimits.description: Default runtime limits applied to all models unless overridden in models.limits entries.

maxToolRounds.title: Max Tool Rounds
maxToolRounds.description: Maximum tool-call loop iterations per run.

compressionThreshold.title: Compression Threshold
compressionThreshold.description: Context compression triggers when estimated tokens exceed this ratio of the context window (0-1).

minKeepMessages.title: Min Keep Messages
minKeepMessages.description: Minimum number of recent messages to preserve during truncation and compression.

maxToolResultChars.title: Max Tool Result Chars
maxToolResultChars.description: Maximum characters per old tool result before truncation.

maxWorkspaceFileChars.title: Max Workspace File Chars
maxWorkspaceFileChars.description: Maximum characters per workspace file (AGENT.md, MEMORY.md, SKILLS.md) included in system prompts.

maxToolRounds.description: Maximum tool-call loop iterations per run.

minKeepMessages.description: Minimum number of recent messages preserved during truncation and compression.

maxToolResultChars.description: Maximum characters per old tool result before truncation.

maxWorkspaceFileChars.description: Maximum characters per workspace file in the system prompt.

providers.title: Providers
providers.description: LLM provider connections (name, base URL, API key).

bind.title: Bind
bind.description: Network binding: loopback (localhost only) or lan (all interfaces).

publicUrl.title: Public URL
publicUrl.description: External URL (e.g. https://myserver.com) for LLM providers to fetch media. Enables URL-based image references instead of base64.

forwarderKey.title: Forwarder Key
forwarderKey.description: Secret key for trusting X-Forwarded-For headers from a reverse proxy.

sessionMaxAgeDays.title: Session Max Age (days)
sessionMaxAgeDays.description: How long login sessions remain valid, in days.

transcriber_provider.title: Transcriber Provider
transcriber_provider.description: Optional preferred provider name for speech-to-text. Falls back to first available transcriber when unset or invalid.

synth_provider.title: Synthesizer Provider
synth_provider.description: Optional preferred provider name for text-to-speech. Falls back to first available synthesizer when unset or invalid.

turn_strategy.title: Turn Strategy
turn_strategy.description: Controls barge-in and turn commit policy for voice sessions.

speculative_llm_enabled.title: Speculative LLM Enabled
speculative_llm_enabled.description: Enable speculative LLM runs on stable interim transcripts for lower latency.

braveApiKey.title: Brave API Key
braveApiKey.description: API key for Brave web search.

google.title: Google Workspace
google.description: Google Workspace tools powered by the gog CLI (gogcli).

binaryPath.title: Binary Path
binaryPath.description: Path to the gog binary. Defaults to 'gog' from PATH.

account.title: Account
account.description: Google account to use (passed as --account to gog).

services.title: Services
services.description: Google services to enable. Default: gmail, calendar, tasks.

github.title: GitHub
github.description: GitHub tools powered by the gh CLI.

binaryPath.title: Binary Path
binaryPath.description: Path to the gh binary. Defaults to 'gh' from PATH.

services.title: Services
services.description: GitHub services to enable. Default: issues, pulls, repos.

gitlab.title: GitLab
gitlab.description: GitLab tools powered by the glab CLI.

binaryPath.title: Binary Path
binaryPath.description: Path to the glab binary. Defaults to 'glab' from PATH.

services.title: Services
services.description: GitLab services to enable. Default: issues, merge_requests, projects.

claudeCode.title: Claude Code
claudeCode.description: Claude Code headless tool for delegating complex coding tasks.

binaryPath.title: Binary Path
binaryPath.description: Path to the claude binary. Defaults to 'claude' from PATH.

allowedTools.title: Allowed Tools
allowedTools.description: Tools Claude Code is allowed to use. Default: Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model override for Claude Code (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-5-20250514).

maxTurnTimeoutSeconds.title: Max Turn Timeout
maxTurnTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum timeout per tool call in seconds.

codex.title: Codex
codex.description: Codex headless tool for delegating complex coding tasks.

binaryPath.title: Binary Path
binaryPath.description: Path to the codex binary. Defaults to 'codex' from PATH.

allowedTools.title: Allowed Tools
allowedTools.description: Tools Codex is allowed to use. Default: Bash, Read, Edit, Write, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, WebSearch.

extraArgs.title: Extra Args
extraArgs.description: Additional CLI args appended to each codex invocation.

maxTurnTimeoutSeconds.title: Max Turn Timeout
maxTurnTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum timeout per tool call in seconds.

token.title: Token
token.description: Long-lived access token from your Home Assistant profile.

readOnly.title: Read-only
readOnly.description: If true, only allow read actions (no control/scene triggers).

allowedDomains.title: Allowed Domains
allowedDomains.description: Optional list of Home Assistant domains the tool may access (e.g. light, switch, climate). Empty = safe defaults.

blockedDomains.title: Blocked Domains
blockedDomains.description: Domains that are always blocked (e.g. lock, alarm_control_panel).

allowedEntities.title: Allowed Entities
allowedEntities.description: Optional explicit entity_id allowlist. Empty = all entities in allowed domains.

timeoutSeconds.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.description: Per-request timeout for Home Assistant API calls.

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for fallback authentication (if no API key).

password.title: Password
password.description: Password for fallback authentication (if no API key).

verifyTls.title: Verify TLS
verifyTls.description: Verify TLS certificates when connecting to Protect.

readOnly.title: Read-only
readOnly.description: If true, only allow read actions (no camera setting changes).

allowedCameras.title: Allowed Cameras
allowedCameras.description: Optional camera name/ID allowlist. Empty = all cameras.

allowDangerousActions.title: Allowed Dangerous Actions
allowDangerousActions.description: Write actions that are explicitly allowed (e.g. set_status_light, set_recording_mode, set_privacy_mode).

timeoutSeconds.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.description: Per-request timeout for UniFi Protect API calls.

allowedUsers.title: Allowed Users
allowedUsers.description: Discord user IDs allowed to interact with the bot.

allowedUsers.title: Allowed Users
allowedUsers.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot.

tickInterval.title: Tick Interval
tickInterval.description: How often the summarizer runs, in minutes.

startupDelay.title: Startup Delay
startupDelay.description: Delay before the first summarization run, in minutes.

inactivityTime.title: Inactivity Time
inactivityTime.description: Session inactivity threshold before summarizing, in minutes.

minMessages.title: Min Messages
minMessages.description: Minimum number of messages required to summarize a session.

maxConversationChars.title: Max Conversation Chars
maxConversationChars.description: Maximum characters of conversation text sent to the LLM.

skillsRegistries.title: Skills Registries
skillsRegistries.description: Online skill registries used for browsing and installing skills.

id.title: Registry ID
id.description: Unique identifier used when selecting a specific registry source.

publisher.title: Publisher
publisher.description: Publisher identity expected in the registry index (e.g. github.com/teanode/teanode-skills).

indexUrl.title: Index URL
indexUrl.description: HTTP(S) URL to the registry index.json.

publicKeys.title: Public Keys
publicKeys.description: Allowed Ed25519 public keys (base64 raw or base64 PKIX DER) for signature verification.

ignoreSignatures.title: Ignore Signatures
ignoreSignatures.description: If true, skip signature verification for this registry.

ignoreUpdates.title: Ignore Updates
ignoreUpdates.description: If true, this registry is skipped by bulk update checks.

secrets.title: Secrets
secrets.description: Named secrets available to skills via {{secret:NAME}} templates.

x-sections.title: Models
x-sections.description: Configure LLM providers, default models, and model-level runtime limits.

x-sections.title: Summarizer
x-sections.description: Background session summarizer timing and limits.
